scripts.validate:cross-field: for file in tests/valid/builder_context_package*.json examples/smart-home-connector/builder_context_package.json; do node scripts/validate-package.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid-cross-field/*.json; do if node scripts/validate-package.mjs "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Invalid cross-field package unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid cross-field package correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:builder-context: for file in tests/valid/builder_context_package*.json examples/smart-home-connector/builder_context_package.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/builder-context-package.schema.json -d "$file"; done
scripts.validate:checkpoint: for file in tests/valid/checkpoint*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-checkpoint.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/checkpoint*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -d "$file"; then echo "Invalid checkpoint fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid checkpoint fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done && for file in tests/invalid-checkpoint-cross-field/*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -d "$file" && if node scripts/validate-checkpoint.mjs "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Invalid checkpoint cross-field fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid checkpoint cross-field fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:intake-result: for file in tests/valid/intake_result_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/intake-result.schema.json -d "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/intake_result_*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/intake-result.schema.json -d "$file"; then echo "Invalid intake result unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid intake result correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:session-state: npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/session-state.schema.json -r schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -r schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d tests/valid/session_state_mode_state.json && npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/session-state.schema.json -r schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -r schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d tests/valid/session_state_correction_with_repair_packet.json && ! npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/session-state.schema.json -r schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -r schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d tests/invalid/session_state_workflow_runtime_mismatch.json && ! npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/session-state.schema.json -r schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -r schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d tests/invalid/session_state_correction_without_repair_packet.json
scripts.validate:repair-packet: for file in tests/valid/repair_packet*.json examples/smart-home-connector/repair_packet_layout_stability_incident.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-repair-packet.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/repair_packet*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-repair-packet.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid repair packet unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid repair packet correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:unit-strategy: for file in tests/valid/unit_strategy_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/unit-strategy-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-unit-strategy-check.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/unit_*.json tests/invalid/smart_home_connector_intrinsic_svg_size_not_layout_size.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/unit-strategy-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-unit-strategy-check.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid unit strategy fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid unit strategy fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:batch-compaction: for file in tests/valid/compact_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/batch-compaction-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-batch-compaction-check.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/compact_*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/batch-compaction-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-batch-compaction-check.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid batch compaction fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid batch compaction fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:cognitive-mode-hint: for file in tests/valid/cognitive_mode_hint_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/cognitive-mode-hint.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-cognitive-mode-hint.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/cognitive_mode_hint_*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/cognitive-mode-hint.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-cognitive-mode-hint.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid cognitive mode hint fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid cognitive mode hint fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
